nasb.text: Looking at them, Jesus *said, “With people it is impossible, but not with God; for all things are possible with God.”

esv.text: Jesus looked at them and said, “With man it is impossible, but not with God. For all things are possible with God.”

cnv.text: 耶穌看著他們，說：“在人不能，在　神卻不然，因為在　神凡事都能。”

ccb.text: 耶稣看着他们说：“对人而言，这不可能，但对上帝而言，凡事都可能。”

csbs.text: 耶稣注视着他们，说：“在人不可能，但在神却不然；因为在神，凡事都可能。”
